ValidationRule.description: Once payment is remitted, Remitted date, remitted cheque number and remitted to values should be populated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: If( ISNEW(), (AND(OR(ISNULL( CreatedDate ),ISBLANK(CreatedDate )),OR( AND( Is_Payment_Remitted__c = True, OR( ISBLANK(Remitted_Cheque_Number__c), ISBLANK(Remitted_Back_To__c), ISBLANK(Remitted_Date__c))), AND( Is_Payment_Remitted__c = False, OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Cheque_Number__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Back_To__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Date__c )) )) ))), (OR( AND( Is_Payment_Remitted__c = True, OR( ISBLANK(Remitted_Cheque_Number__c), ISBLANK(Remitted_Back_To__c), ISBLANK(Remitted_Date__c))), AND( Is_Payment_Remitted__c = False, OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Cheque_Number__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Back_To__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Remitted_Date__c )) )) )))
